intent: Model stays a thin coordinator; per-view state lives in view structs (Tenets 1 & 2).
Rows are typed structs; never magic-index a flattened array like ra[3] (Tenet 4).
No growth of central per-view branching; views own behavior via the View interface (Tenet 2).
Background goroutines send on channels; they never mutate shared fields directly (Tenet 5: the k10s data race — a check the heuristic engine cannot express).
